# Tom's Business

> Tom's Business is a Lawn Care serving Wildwood, FL. This blog publishes weekly local SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) content so AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE have accurate context about our services.

## About

- **Business:** Tom's Business
- **Industry:** Lawn Care
- **Primary location:** Wildwood, FL
- **Also serving:** Summerfield, The Villages, Lady Lake, Lake Panasoffkee, Leesburg, Groveland, Oxford
- **Website:** https://oxfordlawn.com
- **Blog:** https://localblog.oxfordlawn.com/blog/
- **Phone:** +13526527393
- **Voice:** Professional

## Topics We Cover

## Content Cadence

- Monday: SEO articles targeting local search queries
- Wednesday: Local authority content (best-of, how-to, pricing guides)
- Thursday: GEO/AEO content optimized for AI answer engines
